stemHtml: ICAO Annex 13 defines which of the following as a serious injury?

options.a: An injury resulting in severe damage to an internal organ.
options.b: An injury which requires hospitalization for more than 24 hours, commencing within seven days from the date the injury was received.
options.c: An injury which requires hospitalization for more than 12 hours, commencing within seven days from the date the injury was received.
options.d: An injury resulting in a burn affecting more than 10 percent of the body surface.
